title: How many NERV branchess are there
display_title: How many NERV branchess are there
wikitext:
[]: How many NERV branchess are there?             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Thu Oct 26, 2006 7:42 pm Is there only one NERV for ever MAGI, or more? The MAGI groups are in Japan, Germany, U.S., and oddly enough China. One funny thing I read from "Children of an Elder God" is that they mentioned a "NERV-Kenya."

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 26, 2006 8:35 pm We know that there are Magi systems in: Tokyo-3, Japan Matsushiro, Japan Beijing, China Massachusetts, USA Nevada, USA (Presumed) Berlin, Germany Hamburg, Germany I'm curious to know if the second branch of Nerv applies to just the one in Nevada, or if the Massachusetts location is a separate branch. Same thing with the locations in Germany, combined, are they the third branch? From dialog in EoE, I get the impression that there are more Nerv locations than what we see. From episode 17, I believe it's implied that Nevada was "the entire second branch of nerv". Who knows?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Oct 26, 2006 8:41 pm I'd say France, Russia and the UK are also candidates. I suspect Austria is also involved, unless Steyr-Mannlicher got some kind of private contract with the third branch.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 26, 2006 10:00 pm The only official Nerv branches are: First Branch (Massachusetts, USA) Second Branch (Nevada, USA) Third Branch (?Hamburg, Germany) I'm not sure what the official status of the other sites are, but they're not branches.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 26, 2006 10:50 pm How do we know that only these 3 branches are official?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 26, 2006 10:54 pm Because no other ones are ever officially cited, duh. ;;o For what it's worth, they don't call the site in Matsushiro a "branch". In fact, I'm not sure what the hell it is.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Thu Oct 26, 2006 11:00 pm Canada!! Oh, that's right, I forgot: Canada has been submerged. D'oh.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 26, 2006 11:07 pm AuthenticM wrote: Canada!! Oh, that's right, I forgot: Canada has been submerged. D'oh.

[]:             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Thu Oct 26, 2006 11:15 pm Just how many hints did they give during the series about what happened post-Second Impact? I heard somewhere that there were two "Treaties of Valentine" (did Gundam SEED steal that?), and that there was an India-Pakistan nuclear war...

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Oct 26, 2006 11:25 pm Reichu wrote: For what it's worth, they don't call the site in Matsushiro a "branch". In fact, I'm not sure what the hell it is.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Oct 26, 2006 11:29 pm BobBQ wrote: Reichu wrote: For what it's worth, they don't call the site in Matsushiro a "branch". In fact, I'm not sure what the hell it is.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:05 am Reichu wrote: ...it has?

[]:             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:21 am I'll try to find a screencap, then.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:30 am I was about to make a composite image (not like it's necessary, but I do it because I can), but my brain is shutting down. In the morning, then.

[]:             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Fri Oct 27, 2006 12:42 am Hey, thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Sun Oct 29, 2006 3:38 pm Are there any other world maps of the EVA world? I'd like to know which places were destroyed or devestated by Second Impact.
